title: Why do online CDR to BMP converters fail sometimes?
excerpt: When i am trying to convert my Corel Draw CDR Files it fails again and again.

posts.author: sanmart (sanmart)
posts.cookedHtml: When i am trying to convert my Corel Draw CDR Files it fails again and again.

posts.author: drtanvisachar (Dr. Tanvi Sachar- Certified Monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @sanmart monday.com doesn’t support converting CorelDRAW CDR files directly. If the conversion keeps failing, export the file from CorelDRAW first as a PDF, PNG, or JPG, then upload that version to monday.com.

You can upload supported files using the Files column or in Updates.

Dr. Tanvi Sachar
Monday Certified Partner, Tuesday Wizard
